rationale.R1.5: Proposes several structural improvements with clear benefits, such as clarifying the supervision target and tightening the link between goal and training signal.
rationale.R1.6: Improves clarity and precision in multiple areas but leaves some minor issues unaddressed.
rationale.RX.1: Effectively flags uncertainties and acknowledges gaps in the framing and methodology.
rationale.RX.3: Generally within scope with one minor drift into reproducibility details beyond the active set.
